message:
feat(linear): detect linkage conflicts when bead-Linear cross-references disagree

Add SyncField::Linkage variant and linkage_conflict() function that
detects when the bead's linear_issue_id and Linear's bead_id cross-
references point at different entities. Expand idempotency key
fingerprint with bead_claimed_linear_issue_id and linear_claimed_bead_id
fields. Add invoke_plan_sync_surfaces_linkage_conflict integration test.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
